## 1. PROJECT IDENTITY

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Project Name** | PharmaSUD — Pharmacy POS & Inventory Management |
| **Target Market** | Sudanese pharmacies (primary) |
| **Currency** | Sudanese Pound (SDG) |
| **Business Model** | One-time license (250,000 SDG standard) with full code ownership transfer |
| **Repository** | https://github.com/mohamedbabiker20010-code/pharmasud-api (PUBLIC) |
| **Production URL** | https://pharmasud-api.onrender.com |
| **Stack** | FastAPI 0.109 + PostgreSQL 15 + SQLAlchemy 2.0 + Alpine.js 3 + Jinja2 |
| **Hosting** | Render.com (Free tier Web Service + PostgreSQL) |
| **Branch** | `master` (Render watches `master`, NOT `main`) |
| **Admin Contact** | Mohamed (sales) / David (builds) |

## 3. TODAY'S SESSION - PURCHASE FORECAST FORENSIC RECOVERY (2026-07-01)

### Regression Identified
- **Commit `754b861`** introduced report-tabs navigation that linked to other report pages
- Original 1187-line standalone template was replaced with 913-line broken version
- **Root Cause**: Wrong template pattern used (shared_layout instead of standalone) + copied report-tabs from other pages

### Actions Taken
1. ✅ Forensic analysis of git history
2. ✅ Compared current vs. original v7.2.0 template
3. ✅ Restored original `0c7efa7` 1187-line standalone template
4. ✅ Committed restoration as `6d0e1a7`
5. ✅ Pushed to GitHub (Render auto-deploys)

### Key Findings
| Template | Type | Status |
|----------|------|--------|
| purchase_forecast.html | Standalone | ✅ Restored to v7.2.0 (1187 lines, full functionality) |
| reports_profits.html | shared_layout | ✅ Previously fixed (KPIs working) |
| reports_sales.html | shared_layout | ✅ Working (report-tabs navigation) |
| reports_slow_moving.html | shared_layout | ✅ Working |
| sales_history.html | shared_layout | ✅ Working |
| dashboard.html | shared_layout | ✅ Working |
| inventory.html | shared_layout | ✅ Working |

## 10. KNOWN ISSUES (Current — Verified Against Code)

| Issue | Severity | Location | Status |
|-------|----------|----------|--------|
| Mobile sidebar on 2 pages | HIGH | sales_history.html, stocktake.html | ❌ CSS issues (empty placeholders/unclosed braces) |
| Date picker broken on batch receive | HIGH | batch_receive.html | ❌ Known issue |
| POS shows out-of-stock items | MEDIUM | pos.html search | ❌ Known issue |
| No void/edit sale after completion | HIGH | sales.py + POS | ❌ Known issue |
| Camera barcode scanner fails silently | MEDIUM | pos.html | ❌ Known issue |
| Profit report shows 0.00 | HIGH | reports.py | ⚠️ Partially fixed (CSS), logic still needs work |
| Quick medicines hardcoded | MEDIUM | pos.html + sales.py | ❌ Known issue |
| No multi-item cart qty editing | MEDIUM | pos.html | ❌ Known issue |
| RBAC granular enforcement minimal | HIGH | All routers | ❌ Known issue |
| FEFO uses `expiry_date > today` | MEDIUM | batches.py | ❌ Known issue |
| No audit log for login events | MEDIUM | audit.py | ❌ Known issue |

## 12. MILESTONE: UI STANDARDIZATION PHASE COMPLETE

The following pages now share one unified design system:

| Page | Template Type | Status |
|------|---------------|--------|
| Dashboard | shared_layout | ✅ Standardized |
| Medicines | shared_layout | ✅ Standardized |
| Inventory | shared_layout | ✅ Standardized |
| Sales History | shared_layout | ✅ Standardized |
| Sales Report | shared_layout | ✅ Standardized |
| Profit Report | shared_layout | ✅ Standardized |
| Purchase Forecast | standalone | ✅ Restored to v7.2.0 |

All standardized pages share:
- identical page spacing (`.page-content` padding: 24px 28px)
- identical page header layout (`display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:space-between`)
- identical content container (`.main-content` margin-right: 248px on desktop)
- identical responsive behavior (sidebar transforms on mobile, hamburger menu)
- identical KPI card style (`.metric-card` with `.metric-header`, `.metric-icon`, `.metric-label`, `.metric-value`)
- identical typography (IBM Plex Sans Arabic, 26px h1, 14.5px subtitle)
- identical Design System (CSS variables in `static/css/theme.css`)
